subject: Shuckle, a small turtle-like Pokemon with a red rocky shell and yellow worm-like body peeking from holes, resting among rocks and flowers
description: A small reddish-shelled creature peeks out of holes in what appears to be a rocky enclosure. The yellow worm-like body protrudes from multiple openings in the domed red shell. The creature rests on rocky ground surrounded by small orange and yellow flowers. The background shows earthy brown tones and stone-like textures. The mood is tranquil and settled, the creature clearly at home in its rocky nook.
foreground: Shuckle peeking out from its red rocky shell amid flowers
background: rocky earth, small orange and yellow flowers
